sub_pixel_system.notes: No documentation available for sub-pixel system

special_mechanics.name: Club Combat
special_mechanics.description: Big Nose uses a club to kill enemies instead of jumping on them. Up to three stones can be shot out of the club.

special_mechanics.name: Stone Power-up
special_mechanics.description: Stones provide protection and offensive capability; can be collected and used as projectiles from the club.

special_mechanics.name: Single Hit Vulnerability
special_mechanics.description: Big Nose dies in a single hit unless protected by stones, suggesting hit detection is binary without damage scaling.

special_mechanics.name: Non-Swimming
special_mechanics.description: Big Nose cannot swim; water and lava are deadly obstacles, indicating no buoyancy or swim mechanics.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Sources document game design and configuration flags but contain no numerical physics parameters. Game is described as 'somewhat frustrating platformer' with emphasis on club-based combat rather than traditional jump mechanics. No technical movement specs available in documentation.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Big Nose the Caveman article
Wikipedia - Big Nose the Caveman article
